128.caption: BySSH Server Address
128.description: Host name, IP Address, or unix socket (must be an absolute path)

130.caption: BySSH Command Timeout Critical Threshold
130.description: Response time to result in critical status (seconds)

132.caption: BySSH Remote Username
132.description: SSH user name on remote host [optional]

136.caption: BySSH STDERR lines to skip
136.description: Ignore all or (if specified) first n lines on STDERR [optional]

138.caption: BySSH Connection Timeout Warning Threshold
138.description: Response time to result in warning status (seconds)

25.caption: Disk Free space critical threshold
25.description: Exit with CRITICAL status if less than INTEGER units of disk are free or Exit with CRITCAL status if less than PERCENT of disk space is free

139.caption: Disk Include path or partitions (regex case sensitive)
139.description: Regular expression for path or partition (can not  be repeated)

41.caption: Disk Space unit
41.description: Choose bytes, kB, MB, GB, TB (default: MB)

42.caption: Disk Free space warning threshold
42.description: Exit with WARNING status if less than INTEGER units of disk are free or Exit with WARNING status if less than PERCENT of disk space is free

141.caption: Icinga Cluster Zone Lag Critical Threshold
141.description: Critical threshold for log lag in seconds. Applies if the log lag is greater than the threshold.

142.caption: Icinga Cluster Zone Lag Warning Threshold
142.description: Warning threshold for log lag in seconds. Applies if the log lag is greater than the threshold.

152.caption: MySQL Environment settings
152.description: Add a variable to the plugin's environment.

118.caption: CRM Return Critical only on Resource failure
118.description: If failed Nodes, stopped Resources detected or Standby Nodes sends Warning instead of Critical (default) as long as there are no other errors and there is Quorum

119.caption: CRM Ignore standby nodes
119.description: Ignore any node(s) in standby, by default sends Critical

121.caption: CRM Resource fail count
121.description: Resource fail count to start warning on [default = 1]

164.caption: CRM Ignore disabled and unmanaged resources

127.caption: DRBD Return Unknown if No Reources

10622.caption: MySQL SQL Statement
10622.description: The name of a specific component to check

10623.caption: MySQL SQL Statement Metric
10623.description: The secondary name of a component

10430.caption: [NX] Director Health check
10430.description: Provide a list of director health checks

389.caption: [NX] enable experimental neteye version
389.description: Check if the mirror has successfully cloned the latest NetEye version

2473.caption: [NX] Timesync Daemon to monitor
2473.description: Time Sync daemon to query. With systemd-timesyncd, the only mode supported is leap_status
